_comment: Runtime tuning for the free-space meteorite field. Edited by hand; loaded by src/gameplay/Meteorites.ts at boot.

spawnRules._comment: spawnDistance: units in front of the ship when a meteorite is spawned. despawnDistance: if the ship outruns the meteorite by this much, recycle it. freeSpaceOnly: don't spawn inside a flow corridor. Bumped from 40→90 and scale 3-5× from the previous 0.5-2.5 so the field reads as 'asteroid belt', not 'three pebbles'.

weightings._comment: Probability that a fresh spawn is of each type. Normalized at runtime.
